content_body:
Looking for an unforgettable adventure during your cabin trip in Blue Ridge, GA?

Casino Near Georgia

Only a scenic 30-minute drive from Downtown Blue Ridge, you'll discover all kinds of fun at Harrah's Cherokee Valley River Casino & Entertainment Center.

Featuring over 75,000 square feet of gaming floor space, 1,300 slot machines, and 70+ gaming tables.

This dynamic destination is more than just a casino – it’s a one-stop entertainment hub offering something for everyone, kids included.

Casino Attractions

Step into the exciting world of Caesars Casino, where the stakes are high, and the fun never stops! 

Table Games: Over 70 gaming tables - try your luck at Blackjack, Roulette, Craps, Texas Hold 'Em, Mississippi Stud, and Three Card Poker.

Slot Machines: Choose from 1,300 slot machines to test your luck.

Family Fun Galore

Traveling with family? There's plenty to enjoy for both adults and kids.

Bowling Alley: Knock down pins on sixteen 10-pin lanes.

Arcade: Packed with the latest games, it’s a haven for gamers of all ages.

Sports Betting Heaven

Sports enthusiasts, get ready! The Caesars Sportsbook is a must-visit:

Watch games on a massive 32-foot HD screen.

Place bets at convenient kiosks and staffed windows.

Immerse yourself in real-time action for all the biggest sporting events.

Diverse Dining Options

After all that excitement, refuel at the Food Court, featuring:

Panda Express: Enjoy quick and delicious Asian cuisine.

Moe’s Southwest Grill: Savor fresh and customizable Tex-Mex favorites.

Starbucks: Grab a coffee pick-me-up or a sweet treat.

And More: A variety of options to suit any craving!

Casino Day Trip From Blue Ridge GA

Whether you’re looking for high-stakes gaming, family-friendly entertainment, or mouthwatering dining options, Harrah's Cherokee Valley River Casino has it all.

It’s the perfect day trip from Blue Ridge and adds a bit of excitement to your Blue Ridge mountain getaway.

Make a day of it – enjoy a short 30 minute beautiful drive into Murphy, NC for casino and family-fun.

If you're on a couples retreat, enjoy a day at the casino having tons of fun, then head back to your luxury Blue Ridge cabin to relax and recap the day. Soak in the hot tub, watch a movie on the big screen, or just sit outside at the fire pit admiring a sky full of stars. 

Blue Ridge, GA truly has it all - luxury cabins, ideally located to surrounding landmarks, and Blue Ridge Mountain beauty all around.
title: Harrahs Cherokee Valley River Casino
